name: passcay
description: 🦎🔑 Secure & fast Passkey (WebAuthn) library for Zig

releases.name: 3.1.0 - FIDO2 conformance
releases.body:
## What's Changed
* **Real FIDO2 attestation verification**, expanded algorithms, MDS3, and a conformance server by @uzyn in https://github.com/uzyn/passcay/pull/8
* Decode clientDataJSON once in auth.verify by @uzyn in https://github.com/uzyn/passcay/pull/7


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/uzyn/passcay/compare/3.0.0...3.1.0

Zig stable v0.16.0 support + current nightly support (`zig-0.17.0-dev.657`)

No more OpenSSL system library needed! 

## What's Changed
* Zig stable v0.16.0 support by @chpill in https://github.com/uzyn/passcay/pull/3
* Zig current nightly support (`zig-0.17.0-dev.657`)
* Remove OpenSSL dependency (use std.crypto) by @uzyn in https://github.com/uzyn/passcay/pull/4
    * As a result, Windows and macOS is now supported
* Use io.randomSecure for improved challenge generation by @uzyn in https://github.com/uzyn/passcay/pull/5
* Fix clientDataJSON rejection when it carries extra fields by @uzyn in https://github.com/uzyn/passcay/pull/6

## New Contributors
* @chpill made their first contribution in https://github.com/uzyn/passcay/pull/3

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/uzyn/passcay/compare/2.0.0...3.0.0
